description: Evidence-backed rapid deterioration replay: not slow KYC drift, but a multi-day liquidity and governance collapse before bankruptcy.
alarm_title: FTX faces withdrawal pressure and announces non-binding Binance rescue deal

events.title: CoinDesk reports Alameda Research balance sheet heavily depends on FTX's FTT token
events.evidence: Leaked Alameda balance sheet shows dependency on FTT and raises solvency concerns.
events.extracted_fact: Alameda Research's balance sheet is heavily reliant on FTX's FTT token.

events.title: Binance says it will liquidate remaining FTT holdings tied to FTX after CoinDesk revelations
events.evidence: Public counterparty action accelerates market pressure and begins a bank-run dynamic.
events.extracted_fact: Binance plans to liquidate its remaining FTT holdings linked to FTX following revelations by CoinDesk.

events.title: FTX faces withdrawal pressure and announces non-binding Binance rescue deal
events.evidence: FTX withdrawal stress and bailout discussions show acute liquidity deterioration.
events.extracted_fact: FTX is facing pressure to withdraw from a non-binding rescue deal with MASKED_COMPANY_007.

decision.triggering_event: FTX faces withdrawal pressure and announces non-binding Binance rescue deal

description: Energy-payment exposure replay showing Gazprombank's sanctions risk rising despite initial exemptions.
alarm_title: EU removes several Russian banks from SWIFT but spares Gazprombank for energy payments

events.title: Gazprombank is subject to Ukraine/Russia-related sectoral sanctions directives
events.evidence: Gazprombank appears under Ukraine/Russia-related sanctions directives as a Russian financial institution.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001 is subject to sanctions directives related to Ukraine/Russia-related sectors.

events.title: Gazprombank becomes subject to EO 14024 Directive 3 restrictions on new debt and equity
events.evidence: Directive 3 restrictions apply to new debt/equity after effective date.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001 is subject to restrictions under EO 14024 Directive 3 on new debt and equity.

events.title: EU removes several Russian banks from SWIFT but spares Gazprombank for energy payments
events.evidence: Gazprombank is spared because it processes Russian oil and gas payments, creating continuing sanctions exposure.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001 was excluded from the SWIFT network by the EU but was allowed to remain for processing energy-related payments.

decision.triggering_event: EU removes several Russian banks from SWIFT but spares Gazprombank for energy payments

description: Evidence-backed as-of replay showing gradual KYC drift from enterprise BI software toward a leveraged Bitcoin treasury strategy.
reference_model: Enterprise Business Intelligence software and cloud analytics.
alarm_title: MacroStrategy closes $205M Bitcoin-collateralized Silvergate loan to acquire additional Bitcoin

events.title: MicroStrategy announces capital allocation strategy: buyback plus alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin
events.evidence: Company says it may invest up to $250M in alternative assets including digital assets such as bitcoin.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy plans to allocate capital through buybacks and investments in alternative assets, including digital assets like bitcoin.

events.title: MicroStrategy adopts Bitcoin as primary treasury reserve asset with a $250M purchase
events.evidence: Company purchases 21,454 bitcoins and states Bitcoin is now the principal holding in treasury reserve strategy.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy has adopted Bitcoin as its primary treasury reserve asset and has allocated $250 million for its purchase.

events.title: MicroStrategy closes $650M convertible note offering and intends to invest proceeds in Bitcoin
events.evidence: Net proceeds from convertible senior notes are intended for Bitcoin purchases under the Treasury Reserve Policy.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy has closed a $650 million convertible note offering and plans to invest the proceeds in Bitcoin.

events.title: MicroStrategy buys an additional 19,452 bitcoins for $1.026B after issuing more convertible debt
events.evidence: Company now holds over 90,000 BTC and says it will continue acquiring Bitcoin with excess cash and possible debt/equity issuance.
events.extracted_fact: MicroStrategy has purchased an additional 19,452 bitcoins for $1.026 billion using newly issued convertible debt.

events.title: MacroStrategy closes $205M Bitcoin-collateralized Silvergate loan to acquire additional Bitcoin
events.evidence: Subsidiary borrows against Bitcoin collateral; proceeds may be used to purchase more Bitcoin or for corporate purposes.
events.extracted_fact: MacroStrategy secured a $205M Bitcoin-collateralized loan from Silvergate to acquire additional Bitcoin.

decision.triggering_event: MacroStrategy closes $205M Bitcoin-collateralized Silvergate loan to acquire additional Bitcoin

description: Chronological watchlist example: heavy commercial burn-in absorbs early regulatory hits so risk rises gradually without crossing the alarm threshold in this curated window. For Sequoia/FTX investor contagion use run_global_demo --companies FTX OpenAI.
reference_model: AI research lab monetising via API and subscriptions.
alarm_title: Italian privacy regulator orders temporary ban on OpenAI ChatGPT over unlawful data collection

events.title: Italian privacy regulator orders temporary ban on OpenAI ChatGPT over unlawful data collection
events.evidence: Garante Privacy restricts ChatGPT processing in Italy, citing missing legal basis for training data collection.
events.extracted_fact: The Italian privacy regulator has ordered a temporary ban on MASKED_COMPANY_001's ChatGPT service due to unlawful data collection practices.

decision.triggering_event: Italian privacy regulator orders temporary ban on OpenAI ChatGPT over unlawful data collection

description: Russian energy-sector escalation replay from sectoral controls to full US/UK oil-major designation.
reference_model: Vertically integrated Russian oil and gas producer.
alarm_title: UK sanctions notice lists PJSC Surgutneftegas with asset-freeze and trust-services restrictions

events.title: US sectoral restrictions target Russian oil companies including Surgutneftegas
events.evidence: OpenSanctions records US sanctions entries for Surgutneftegas starting 2014-09-12.
events.extracted_fact: US sectoral restrictions have been imposed on Russian oil companies including MASKED_COMPANY_001.

events.title: BIS Entity List restrictions apply to Surgutneftegas-linked Russian energy technology exposure
events.evidence: BIS Entity List entry appears in sanctions adjacency data.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001 is subject to BIS Entity List restrictions due to its association with Russian energy technology.

events.title: G7/EU oil price cap increases Surgutneftegas sanctions exposure for Russian oil exports
events.evidence: Oil price cap comes into effect to reduce Russia's ability to finance the war.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001's involvement in Russian oil exports has increased its sanctions exposure due to the G7/EU oil price cap.

events.title: EU refined oil products ban adds revenue pressure on Surgutneftegas and Russian energy sector
events.evidence: Refined oil product restrictions add sectoral pressure to Russian oil producers.
events.extracted_fact: The EU refined oil products ban has increased revenue pressure on MASKED_COMPANY_001 and the Russian energy sector.

events.title: US and UK designate Surgutneftegas and Gazprom Neft as major Russian oil sanctions targets
events.evidence: UK and US directly sanction two major Russian oil companies, including PJSC Surgutneftegas.
events.extracted_fact: MASKED_COMPANY_001 has been designated as a major Russian oil sanctions target by the US and UK.

events.title: UK sanctions notice lists PJSC Surgutneftegas with asset-freeze and trust-services restrictions
events.evidence: Official notice lists PJSC SURGUTNEFTEGAS with date designated 10/01/2025.
events.extracted_fact: UK sanctions have imposed asset-freeze and trust-services restrictions on PJSC MASKED_COMPANY_001.

decision.triggering_event: UK sanctions notice lists PJSC Surgutneftegas with asset-freeze and trust-services restrictions

description: Sanctions escalation replay from 2014 sectoral restrictions to 2022 full blocking sanctions.

events.title: EU introduces targeted restrictive measures on Russian capital markets and sensitive sectors
events.source: Court of Justice / Council Decision 2014/512 context
events.evidence: Council Decision 2014/512 introduced sectoral restrictions after Russia's destabilisation of Ukraine.

events.title: VTB appears under EU sectoral restrictive measures linked to Russia's actions in Ukraine
events.evidence: VTB listing date under EU Russia sectoral restrictive measures.
events.extracted_fact: VTB is subject to EU sectoral restrictive measures due to its association with Russia's actions in Ukraine.

events.title: US issues new Russia-related blocking measures as Ukraine crisis escalates
events.evidence: New executive actions follow Russia's continued efforts to undermine Ukraine sovereignty.

events.title: US announces full blocking sanctions on VTB, Russia's second largest financial institution
events.evidence: Full blocking sanctions freeze VTB assets touching the US financial system.
events.extracted_fact: The United States has imposed full blocking sanctions on VTB, Russia's second largest financial institution.

events.title: EU orders VTB and six other Russian banks disconnected from SWIFT
events.evidence: SWIFT disconnection further limits access to global financial infrastructure.
events.extracted_fact: The European Union has ordered VTB and six other Russian banks to be disconnected from SWIFT.

events.title: SWIFT disconnection becomes operational for selected Russian banks including VTB
events.evidence: SWIFT said it would disconnect the seven Russian banks as required by EU regulations.
events.extracted_fact: SWIFT disconnection has become operational for selected Russian banks including VTB.

decision.triggering_event: SWIFT disconnection becomes operational for selected Russian banks including VTB

description: Evidence-backed replay showing accounting-risk drift before Wirecard's insolvency shock.
reference_model: Licensed payment processing and merchant acquiring.
alarm_title: KPMG special audit cannot verify key Wirecard profit arrangements and cash balances

events.title: Financial Times begins questioning inconsistencies in Wirecard's accounts
events.evidence: FT timeline records early investigative reporting questioning Wirecard's accounting years before insolvency.
events.extracted_fact: Financial Times has raised concerns about inconsistencies in Wirecard's financial accounts.

events.title: FT reports suspicious transactions and alleged forged/backdated contracts in Wirecard's Singapore operations
events.evidence: Reuters timeline notes a January 2019 FT report on suspicious transactions and accounting-practice integrity.
events.extracted_fact: Suspicious transactions and alleged forged or backdated contracts were reported in Wirecard's Singapore operations.

events.title: Wirecard hires KPMG to conduct an independent special audit under investor pressure
events.evidence: Independent audit commissioned to address allegations that finance team inflated reported sales and profits.
events.extracted_fact: Wirecard has engaged KPMG to perform an independent special audit due to investor pressure.

events.title: KPMG special audit cannot verify key Wirecard profit arrangements and cash balances
events.evidence: KPMG was unable to verify cash balances and could not trace transactions underpinning major reported profits.
events.extracted_fact: A special audit of MASKED_COMPANY_007 cannot verify key profit arrangements and cash balances.

decision.triggering_event: KPMG special audit cannot verify key Wirecard profit arrangements and cash balances
